name: graffiticode-www
description: graffiticode.org — the canonical agent-engagement site. A projection of the live MCP server.

scripts.verify: npm run generate && npm run check:links
scripts.gcp:build: gcloud builds submit --config cloudbuild.yaml --project artcompiler-marketing --substitutions=COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'latest')
scripts.gcp:deploy: gcloud run deploy www --source . --region us-central1 --platform managed --allow-unauthenticated --project artcompiler-marketing
scripts.gcp:logs: gcloud run logs read www --region us-central1 --project artcompiler-marketing
